name: Button
summary: Capsule-shaped actions with a restrained Apple-inspired hierarchy.
structurePatterns: Full-pill silhouette with no hard corners
Primary fill reserved for the main action
Secondary action stays visually quiet and text-led

structures.name: Primary CTA
structures.description: Filled pill button using the brand blue for single-focus calls to action.
notes: Use one dominant CTA per surface

structures.name: Secondary Link Button
structures.description: Text-first secondary action with a trailing chevron-like advance mark.
